description.value: **Benefit:** You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks and Bluff is a class skill for you. Attention! Legal Stuff Ahead! The name or some of the content on this page has been slightly edited in order for us to be in compliance with the Pathfinder Compatibility License. While the rules (mechanics) have not changed, if you prefer the original wording we may have made a copy of it on our sister website. It is built and maintained by the same collaborators who work on d20pfsrd.com. Otherwise, read on! only the names have been changed to protect the innocent!
